text.autoconfig.smartautomine.title: Smart Auto Mine
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.min: Stop (or switch tools, if Use more tools is on) before the current tool's remaining durability drops below this absolute value.
Stop (or switch tools, if Use more tools is on) before the current tool's remaining durability drops below this percentage.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.hun: On (default): auto-disable if your hunger drops below the threshold below, independent of the auto-eat feature. A safety net for hardcore/no-food-on-hand situations.
Stop when hunger drops below this value, on the vanilla 0-20 hunger scale (20 = full, each drumstick icon = 2 points). Only used while Hunger safety stop above is on.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.hea: On (default): auto-disable if your health drops below the threshold below, on the vanilla 0-20 health scale (20 = full, each heart icon = 2 points). A safety net independent of everything else.
Stop when health drops below this value, on the vanilla 0-20 health scale (20 = full, each heart icon = 2 points). Only used while Health safety stop above is on.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.max: Free text, e.g. '90m', '1.5h', '5400s', '1h30m', or a bare number of seconds. Auto-disable after this long, even if durability isn't exhausted.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.use: Off (default): stop as soon as the current tool's durability guard triggers. On: instead, look for another matching tool (see Tool keyword below) elsewhere in your hotbar and switch to it, only stopping once none are left with enough durability.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.too: Used when Use more tools is on. Substring match (case-insensitive) against the tool's item ID, e.g. 'pickaxe' matches minecraft:diamond_pickaxe, minecraft:netherite_pickaxe, etc.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.reg: How plain mining is driven. CONTINUOUS (default): holds the mine button while playing (no attack-indicator flicker) and only drives the game directly while a screen is open, so it keeps mining through inventory/chat. VANILLA_INPUT: only ever holds the mine button - no flicker, but pauses while a screen is open. LEGACY: always drives the game directly (the pre-A0.4.1 behaviour) - keeps mining through screens, but the attack indicator flickers constantly, like Toro's Auto Mine.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.pla: Place-mine while a screen is open

What place-mine does while inventory/chat is open. VANILLA (default): pauses, resumes when the screen closes - simple and reliable. ADVANCED (experimental): keeps placing and mining through an open screen by driving the game directly. It may not place/till perfectly reliably while the screen is open.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.fin: Finish last block when offhand empties

Place-mine only. Off (default): stop the instant the offhand runs out, which can leave the block you just placed sitting there unmined. On: keep going for another 0.75 seconds so that last block still gets finished. Only applies to running out of offhand items - durability, hunger, health and time limits always stop immediately.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.pau: Pause timer while mining is paused

Affects the Max duration timer. Off (default): the timer always counts down, even while the mod is paused with a screen open (in a mode that pauses, i.e. regular Vanilla input or place-mine Vanilla). On: the timer freezes during that pause, so the limit measures actual working time instead of idle menu time. Time spent auto-eating is always excluded regardless.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.fee: How to notify you when auto-mine toggles or auto-stops.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.wai: On (default): after finishing a bite, wait an extra 0.5 seconds before resuming mining, as a safety buffer. Off: resume mining almost immediately after eating finishes.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.pla: On (default): play the sound below whenever the mod stops itself (hunger safety, durability/no usable tool, time limit, offhand empty). Does not play when you manually toggle it off yourself.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.aut: Full sound event ID to play on auto-stop, e.g. minecraft:block.bell.use, minecraft:entity.experience_orb.pickup, minecraft:entity.villager.no. Invalid/unknown IDs simply play nothing.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.res: Off (default): if you reconnect yourself (not via the separate Smart Auto Reconnect mod), the mod turns itself off rather than silently resuming. On: it stays on and resumes after a short settle buffer, same as a scripted reconnect always does regardless of this setting.
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.aut: On (default): auto-eat is active whenever the hotbar slot below is set. Off: auto-eat never triggers, regardless of the hotbar slot - a quick way to disable eating without losing your configured slot/threshold.
Hotbar slot (1-9) holding your food item. 0 disables auto-eat.
Eat a bite when your hunger drops below this value, on the vanilla 0-20 hunger scale (same as the hunger bar: 20 = full, each drumstick icon = 2 points, so 10 = half the bar).
text.autoconfig.smartautomine.option.foo: LIGHT (default): blocks only enchanted golden apple and pufferfish. FOOD_INSPECTOR: also blocks rotten flesh, spider eye, raw chicken, and poisonous potato. RAT: no extra blocks. Cake and chorus fruit are always blocked no matter the preset.
